name: Phantom Break
short_description: Phantom Break is a third-person escape and tactical ghost-slaying game.
detailed_description:
In the eerie cemetery, hunt down all the ghosts. But it won't be easy: you must evade their attacks and search for the only weapon that can harm them—the Ghost Sword. The Ghost Sword possesses immense power, but each strike drains its energy. Using it wisely will be the key to your survival.

  • Choose from four distinct professions to take on the challenge, each with their own expertise. For example, the Athlete has permanently max stamina, allowing for extended sprinting.

  • Multiple modes are available, with ghost attributes and numbers randomized in each, offering entirely different survival challenges.

  • Supports multiple languages

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
